news.t: Six of the Best Small-Cap ETFs to Buy Now
6 Best Growth ETFs to Buy Now

holdings.infoBox: SLYG is an equity ETF with a total of 346 individual holdings. The top holdings are Sanmina stock at 1.63%, Viavi Solutions at 1.44%, FormFactor at 1.36%, Semtech at 1.30%, and Argan at 1.10%.

overview.description: The State Street SPDR S&P 600 Small Cap Growth ETF (SLYG) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Small Cap 600 Growth index, a market-cap-weighted index of US small-cap securities exhibiting growth characteristics. SLYG was launched on Sep 25, 2000 and is issued by State Street.
